kashmir.title: Kashmir
kashmir.description: Experience the 'Paradise on Earth' with its serene lakes, lush valleys, and snow-capped peaks. A timeless beauty that captivates every visitor.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Srinagar & Houseboat Stay
itinerary.activities: Welcome to Srinagar! Our representative will pick you up from the airport and transfer you to a premium houseboat on Dal Lake. Enjoy a relaxing 1-hour Shikara ride in the evening. Dinner and overnight stay at the houseboat.

itinerary.title: Day Excursion to Sonamarg
itinerary.activities: After breakfast, drive to Sonamarg, the 'Meadow of Gold'. Enjoy the breathtaking views of snow-clad peaks. You can take a pony ride to the Thajiwas Glacier. Return to Srinagar hotel for an overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Srinagar to Gulmarg Adventure
itinerary.activities: Drive to Gulmarg, famous for its ski resorts and the world's highest 18-hole golf course. Experience the famous Gondola Cable Car ride (tickets at own cost) up to Phase 1 or 2. Evening return to Srinagar.

itinerary.title: Pahalgam - The Valley of Shepherds
itinerary.activities: Proceed to Pahalgam. En route, visit the saffron fields and Awantipora ruins. In Pahalgam, enjoy the serene Lidder river and lush green pine forests. You can visit Betaab Valley or Aru Valley via local union cabs. Return to Srinagar.

itinerary.title: Departure from Srinagar
itinerary.activities: After a hearty breakfast, pack your wonderful memories. Our driver will drop you at the Srinagar Airport for your onward journey.

reviews.name: Priya Sharma
reviews.text: Kashmir truly is paradise! Tripzo organized everything flawlessly. The houseboat experience was magical, and our driver was extremely polite. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Rahul Verma
reviews.text: Great trip. The views in Gulmarg were stunning. The only issue was the cold weather in the evenings, but the hotel provided good heaters. Overall, a 10/10 experience.

manali.title: Manali
manali.description: Discover adventure in the Himalayan gateway, from snowy peaks and paragliding thrills to the serene beauty of the Beas River valleys.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Manali & Local Sightseeing
itinerary.activities: Arrive in Manali via overnight Volvo. Check into the hotel and rest. Later, visit Hadimba Temple, Vashisht Village, and the Tibetan Monastery. Evening free to explore Mall Road.

itinerary.title: Adventure at Solang Valley
itinerary.activities: Full day excursion to Solang Valley. Enjoy breathtaking views and thrilling adventure activities like paragliding, zorbing, and ATVs (activities at own cost). Return to hotel for dinner.

itinerary.title: Kullu & Naggar Castle
itinerary.activities: After breakfast, head towards Kullu for river rafting. Visit the shawl factories and the historic Naggar Castle, known for its beautiful architecture and art gallery.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.activities: Check out from the hotel by noon. Spend your afternoon shopping for souvenirs. Catch the evening Volvo bus back to Delhi with unforgettable memories.

reviews.name: Ananya Desai
reviews.text: The Manali trip was perfect! The Volvo journey was comfortable, and our hotel had an amazing view of the snow-capped mountains. Solang Valley was the highlight!

ooty.title: Ooty
ooty.description: Ride the iconic toy train through misty Nilgiri hills, explore sprawling tea estates, and enjoy the serene beauty of the 'Queen of Hill Stations'.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Ooty
itinerary.activities: Arrive at Coimbatore airport/station and transfer to Ooty. Check-in to your heritage hotel. Evening at leisure to enjoy the cool climate.

itinerary.title: Ooty Local Sightseeing
itinerary.activities: Visit the famous Botanical Gardens, Ooty Lake for boating, and Doddabetta Peak. Experience the beautiful rose gardens.

itinerary.title: Coonoor & Toy Train Ride
itinerary.activities: Experience the famous Nilgiri Mountain Railway (Toy Train) journey to Coonoor. Visit Sim's Park, Lamb's Rock, and Dolphin's Nose. Return to Ooty by cab.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.activities: After breakfast, check out from the hotel and drive back to Coimbatore for your return journey.

reviews.name: Vikram Singh
reviews.text: A very relaxing trip. The Toy Train ride was iconic. The driver provided by Tripzo was very knowledgeable and knew all the best local food joints.

puducherry.title: Puducherry
puducherry.description: Find a unique touch of French colonial charm, stroll along serene beaches, and discover spiritual havens like Auroville.

itinerary.title: Arrival & French Quarter Walk
itinerary.activities: Arrive in Puducherry and check-in. In the evening, take a stroll through the White Town (French Quarter) and relax at the Promenade Beach.

itinerary.title: Auroville & Paradise Beach
itinerary.activities: Visit the experimental township of Auroville and the Matrimandir. Later, take a boat ride to the beautiful and clean Paradise Beach.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.activities: Visit the Aurobindo Ashram and the local markets for some shopping before heading back home.

reviews.name: Neha Gupta
reviews.text: Loved the vibe of Pondy! The boutique hotel arranged by the agency was right in the middle of White Town. Very Instagrammable trip!

tokyo.title: Tokyo
tokyo.description: From ancient temples to neon-lit skyscrapers, Tokyo is a city of endless discovery.

itinerary.title: Kon'nichiwa Tokyo!
itinerary.activities: Arrive at Narita or Haneda Airport. Transfer to your hotel in Shinjuku. Rest and explore the neon-lit streets in the evening.

itinerary.title: Tokyo City Tour
itinerary.activities: Visit the historic Senso-ji Temple in Asakusa, the Tokyo Skytree, and experience the famous Shibuya crossing.

itinerary.title: Mt. Fuji & Hakone Day Trip
itinerary.activities: Take a bus tour to the 5th Station of Mt. Fuji (weather permitting). Enjoy a cruise on Lake Ashi and take the Hakone Ropeway.

itinerary.title: Kyoto via Bullet Train
itinerary.activities: Experience the high-speed Shinkansen (Bullet Train) to Kyoto. Visit the Fushimi Inari Shrine and return to Tokyo by evening.

itinerary.title: Free Day / Disneyland
itinerary.activities: Spend the day at your leisure. You can opt for a trip to Tokyo Disneyland or go shopping in the Ginza district.

itinerary.title: Sayonara
itinerary.activities: Check out and head to the airport for your flight back home.

reviews.name: Michael Smith
reviews.text: An absolutely surreal experience. The bullet train ride and the view of Mt. Fuji were breathtaking. The agency planned it flawlessly.

bali.title: Bali
bali.description: The Island of Gods, offering lush jungles, iconic rice paddies, and stunning beaches.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Bali
itinerary.activities: Arrive at Denpasar Airport. Meet our representative and transfer to your luxurious Private Pool Villa in Seminyak.

itinerary.title: Ubud Tour & Kintamani
itinerary.activities: Visit the famous Tegalalang Rice Terraces, enjoy the Bali Jungle Swing, and view the magnificent Mount Batur volcano.

itinerary.title: Water Sports & Uluwatu
itinerary.activities: Head to Nusa Dua for thrilling water sports. In the evening, visit the clifftop Uluwatu Temple and watch the traditional Kecak Fire Dance at sunset.

itinerary.title: Nusa Penida Island Tour
itinerary.activities: Take a speedboat to Nusa Penida. Visit the iconic Kelingking Beach (T-Rex cliff), Angel's Billabong, and Broken Beach.

itinerary.title: Leisure & Spa
itinerary.activities: Spend a relaxing day at your villa. Enjoy a traditional 2-hour Balinese massage followed by a romantic sunset dinner at Jimbaran Bay.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.activities: Check out and head to the airport, taking a piece of Bali in your heart.

reviews.name: Karan & Simran
reviews.text: Booked this for our honeymoon and it was the best decision ever! The private pool villa was stunning and the Nusa Penida tour was surreal.

berlin.title: Berlin
berlin.description: Experience the rich history and vibrant culture of Germany's iconic capital.

itinerary.title: Arrival
itinerary.activities: Transfer to your hotel. Evening at leisure to explore the local German cafes.

itinerary.title: Berlin Wall & Brandenburg Gate
itinerary.activities: Take a guided walking tour covering the remnants of the Berlin Wall, Checkpoint Charlie, and the iconic Brandenburg Gate.

itinerary.title: Museum Island
itinerary.activities: Use your WelcomeCard to explore the world-famous Museum Island and the Berlin Cathedral.

itinerary.title: Potsdam Day Trip
itinerary.activities: Take a short train ride to Potsdam to see the stunning Sanssouci Palace and its beautiful gardens.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.activities: Check out from the hotel and head to the airport.

london.title: London
london.description: Discover the iconic landmarks, royal heritage, and bustling streets of London.

itinerary.title: Welcome to London
itinerary.activities: Arrive at Heathrow and transfer to the hotel. Spend the evening walking around Covent Garden.

itinerary.title: Royal London
itinerary.activities: Watch the Changing of the Guard at Buckingham Palace, visit Westminster Abbey, and ride the London Eye.

itinerary.title: History & Cruise
itinerary.activities: Visit the Tower of London and Big Ben. In the evening, enjoy a relaxing Thames River Cruise.

itinerary.title: Museums & Shopping
itinerary.activities: Explore the British Museum or Natural History Museum. Later, shop at Oxford Street and Harrods.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.activities: Transfer back to the airport for your flight home.

wuhan.title: Wuhan
wuhan.description: Explore the historical sites and modern marvels of this dynamic city.

itinerary.title: Arrival
itinerary.activities: Arrive in Wuhan, transfer to the hotel, and rest.

itinerary.title: Historical Tour
itinerary.activities: Visit the iconic Yellow Crane Tower and the Hubei Provincial Museum.

itinerary.title: Nature & Cruise
itinerary.activities: Stroll around the beautiful East Lake. In the evening, enjoy a dazzling Yangtze River Cruise.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.activities: Check out and head to the airport.
